A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed the right high-level approach but implemented the filtering incorrectly in its contributing SQL (using substr(time, 1, 4) = '2019' and CAST(rating AS REAL) >= 4.5), which undercounted 2019 high-rating reviews and yielded top counts of 8/7/6 (gmap_20/gmap_53/gmap_40) instead of the true 19/17/14 including Encino Dermatology (gmap_35).

B. Failure modes encountered:

FM4: yes
